Metadata.title: Juglee — Never watch the same video twice
Metadata.description: Juglee marks your YouTube videos as watched with a visible badge. Free Chrome extension so you never re-watch a video.
Metadata.ogDescription: Never watch the same video twice.

Hero.title: Mark <highlight>YouTube videos</highlight> as <mark>watched</mark>, in one click
Hero.subtitle: Juglee displays a badge on thumbnails of videos you've already watched. Spot them at a glance before you click.

Problem.label: The problem
Problem.title: YouTube doesn't remember what you've watched
Problem.description: You scroll through your recommendations and come across a video. You click, watch 30 seconds... and realize you've already seen it. It's frustrating and a waste of your time.
Problem.stat2Label: lost per month due to already-watched videos
Problem.stat3Label: videos on YouTube with no tracking system

Features.label: Features
Features.title: Everything you need
Features.feature1Description: A single click to mark a video as watched. The icon appears instantly on the thumbnail.
Features.feature2Description: Spot already-watched videos at a glance thanks to the badge displayed directly on YouTube.
Features.feature3Description: Track your watched videos, browse your history, and manage your data — all from the extension popup.
Features.feature4Description: All your data is stored locally in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server. You're in full control.

HowItWorks.label: How it works
HowItWorks.title: Dead simple
HowItWorks.step1Description: Add Juglee to Chrome in one click. No setup required.
HowItWorks.step2Description: Browse YouTube as usual. Juglee works in the background.
HowItWorks.step3Description: Click the icon to mark a video. The badge appears on the thumbnail.

Pricing.title: Free, forever
Pricing.footnote: Compatible with Chrome and Chromium browsers (Edge, Brave, Opera...).
Pricing.installStep3: Enable <bold>Developer mode</bold> in the top right

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.a1: Juglee is a Chrome extension that integrates directly into YouTube. Once installed, it lets you manually mark videos as watched. A badge then appears on the thumbnails of marked videos, everywhere on YouTube.
FAQ.a2: Yes. Juglee is 100% free and always will be. No subscription, no hidden fees. Install the extension and use it without limits.
FAQ.a3: Yes. All your data is stored locally in your browser via chrome.storage.local. No data is sent to any external server. You can also export your data as JSON at any time.
FAQ.q4: What happens if I have too many marked videos?
FAQ.a4: Juglee includes an automatic cleanup system. When storage reaches 9 MB, the oldest videos are automatically removed to free up space.
FAQ.q5: Does the extension work on Firefox or Safari?
FAQ.a5: For now, Juglee is available only on Google Chrome and Chromium-based browsers like Edge, Brave, Opera, etc. A Firefox version may be considered in the future.
FAQ.a6: You can reach us by email for any question or issue. We typically respond within 24 hours.

Download.title: Download Juglee
Download.subtitle: Enter your license key to download the extension.
Download.label: License Key
Download.successDescription: Your license key is valid. Click below to download the extension.
Download.errorDescription: This license key was not found. Please check your email and try again.
Download.installStep3: Enable "Developer mode" in the top right
